theme_and_archetype.description: A high-contrast, structured, and function-first interface inspired by industrial control rooms. Relies on deep slate bases and high-visibility safety amber/orange accents. It prioritizes clarity, data density, and operational reliability.

rules: CRITICAL: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans.
Data tables and financial numbers MUST use tabular nums utility (tabular-nums).
Section headers must be tight and concise.
Tinted Grey Rule applied: Grays are slate/blue-tinted to feel technical.
No gradients for standard UI elements. Solid colors only.
Interactive element text contrast must be minimum 4.5:1.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use tight spacings inside cards (p-4 to p-6) to maximize data density, but generous gaps between sections (gap-6 to gap-8).
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radius: Max border-radius of 4px (rounded-sm) for a sharp, robust industrial feel. Heavy reliance on 1px solid borders.
layout_and_spacing.navigation: Collapsible sidebar on desktop (w-64 expanded, w-16 collapsed). Bottom nav or hamburger menu for mobile viewports.

component_rules.buttons: Solid backgrounds, sharp corners (rounded-sm). Hover states must increase color intensity. Add 1px subtle border to primary buttons.
component_rules.cards: Flat background with 1px border. No shadows in default state. Hover state: subtle shadow and border color shift.
component_rules.tables: Dense layout, sticky headers, striped rows for readability. Always include filters/search at the top right of the table container.
component_rules.forms: Inputs use solid borders, background slightly darker than surface in dark mode. Clear focus rings (ring-2 ring-primary).
component_rules.dashboards: KPI cards must include trend indicators (red/green arrows). Use Shadcn charts (recharts) for line/bar visualization.
component_rules.status_badges: Solid background with 20% opacity of the semantic color, text in 100% semantic color. Square corners.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp and instant. Background shifts up one lightness step.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for dashboard widgets (delay-75, delay-150, etc.).
motion_and_interactions.navigation: Sidebar expansion must be smooth (width transition).

icons.style: Duotone or bold weight for high legibility in industrial contexts.

image_urls.description: Industrial concrete and scaffolding building, modern construction site.
Abstract 3D rendering of industrial steel beams with amber/orange data streams in a dark void.
Minimalist, modern logo for an industrial ERP software. Slate and amber geometric shape.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a robust, functional industrial ERP layout. Prioritize data density, crisp edges, and high-contrast text.
instructions_to_main_agent.theming: Implement dark mode by default but ensure full light mode support. Use the defined Slate and Amber/Orange palette.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_execution: Sidebar must house the 14 modules logically grouped (e.g., Core, Operations, HR, Finance). The Executive Dashboard is the default route post-login.
instructions_to_main_agent.data_visualization: Use Shadcn Charts to build out the revenue, expenses, and pending payments line/bar charts. Avoid donut charts for critical metrics; prefer bar or line.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
